trigger.title: [Email] Refund denied for ZAGG Ultra Eco Google Pixel....

root_cause.assessment: The status change is most likely expected Linear duplicate handling. Linear documentation states that marking an issue as duplicate changes the issue status to a canceled status, matching the payload's Duplicate/canceled state.
root_cause.remaining_risk: The canonical duplicate issue could not be verified without Linear MCP/API access.

handoff_notes: Use .agent/DTS-1689-debug-prompt.md as the prompt template for a Composio-launched Cursor agent.
First external step is to fetch DTS-1689 with full comments, relations, status history, and canonical duplicate metadata.
If the canonical issue matches the same Amazon refund denial email/thread/message ID, leave DTS-1689 Duplicate/canceled and add the root-cause comment.
If no canonical duplicate exists or it is unrelated, investigate the Gmail triage automation and add a focused regression test before any fix.
